All Types

absolute

always | fundamental | inexcusable | must | never | only

aggression

ambush | attack | blast | hit with | rip | roast | scathing | slam | taken out | torch | under fire

authority

according to | authorities say | experts say | experts warn | trusted partners

clickbait

bombshell | break | devastate | exclusive | finally | jaw-dropping | must-see | must-watch | nightmare | reveal | shock | shocking | stunning | wild | you won't believe

colloquialism

ain't | gotta | kinda | y'all

conflict

chaos | clash | erupt | feud | plot | showdown | snub | spark | wipeout

derogatory

bigot | dissident | elite | extremist | horde | illegal aliens | mob | radical | thug | trash | woke

distancing

alleged | purportedly | suspected

euphemism

collateral damage | enhanced interrogation | non-consensual encounter | passed away | probe

exaggeration

alarming | countless | eye-watering | huge | incredibly | massive | outrageous | staggering | totally | up to 10

fear

dangerous | frighten | horrify | panic | terrify | terror | threat | urgent

hype

big win | breakthrough | cutting-edge | game-changing | must-have | revolutionary

idiom

gone to ground | holed up

loaded

government handouts | tax relief | taxpayer-funded

loaded-framing

elitist | level playing field | loophole | officer-involved shooting | poison pill | rightsize | runaway debt | science and common sense | self-styled | so-called | sunset

minimizing

mere | minor

moral

brutal | controversial | courage | corrupt | deluded | despicable | draconian | evil | fair | fearless | heroic | oppressive | piracy | protect | ridiculous | right thing to do | ruthless | scandal | scandalous | sinful

negative-framing

bloodbath | bloated | catastrophic | disaster | gruesome | hardline | horrific | junta | puppet | regime | tragedy

passive

incident occurred | mistakes were made

repetition

again and again | more and more | over and over | time after time | time and time again

reveal

inside scoop | secret | the truth about | what's really

rhetorical-question

correct? | isn't it? | right?

superlative

best | biggest | most | ultimate | worst

uncertainty

apparently | reportedly | suspicion of

unsourced

experts claim | multiple sources | people close to | people familiar | sources say | unnamed sources
